title: mentha × stachyoides var. muelleriana
intro: Mentha × stachyoides var. muelleriana, also known as Mueller's Peppermint or Australian Peppermint, is a variety of hybrid mint plant native to Australia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its menthol content, which has been used to alleviate digestive issues, headaches, and respiratory problems. The health benefits of Mentha × stachyoides var. muelleriana include its ability to ease nausea, reduce inflammation, and provide relief from menstrual cramps. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, essential oils, and infusions, which can be used to promote relaxation and improve overall well-being.
